NC500 Motorcycle Route

Every stop on the North Coast 500 — 516 miles of Scotland's finest
516
Miles
5-7
Days Recommended
19
Key Stops
#StopTypeNotes
1 Inverness Start/End Capital of the Highlands — fuel up and stock supplies
2 Beauly Town Pretty village with great cafés and a ruined priory
3 Applecross Must-Ride Bealach na Bà pass — the most dramatic road in Britain
4 Torridon Scenery Jaw-dropping mountains and single-track roads
5 Gairloch Fuel Stop Last reliable fuel before remote northwest section
6 Ullapool Town Harbour town with fish & chips and ferry connections
7 Lochinver Detour Stunning coastal detour via Drumbeg road
8 Kylesku Scenery Modern bridge over dramatic fjord-like sea loch
9 Durness Must-Stop Smoo Cave, Balnakeil Beach — northwest corner of mainland
10 Tongue Scenery Causeway across Kyle of Tongue with mountain backdrop
11 Bettyhill Town North coast village with Strathnaver Museum
12 Thurso Town Most northerly mainland town — Scrabster harbour nearby
13 John o' Groats Landmark Iconic endpoint — photo op essential
14 Wick Fuel Stop Last major town before heading south along east coast
15 Helmsdale Town Fishing village with La Mirage café
16 Brora / Golspie Scenery Coastal riding with Dunrobin Castle detour
17 Dornoch Town Cathedral town and Dornoch Firth crossing
18 Tain Town Glenmorangie Distillery stop for non-riding day
19 Inverness End Loop complete — 516 miles of the best riding in Britain
